Detailed Description

Free‑space (homogeneous) Green's function provider.

Implements:

  • Scalar Green's function \(G(r,r') = e^{ik|r-r'|}/(4\pi|r-r'|)\).
  • Gradient \(\nabla^{\prime} G\) and full dyadic Green's function.
  • Smoothed kernels used for singularity subtraction when triangles are close or coincident.
  • Batched assembly helpers over groups of RWG functions living on the same triangles to reduce repeated kernel evaluations.

Definition at line 35 of file GreenFHom3D.h.

Member Function Documentation

◆ AboveThreshold() [1/2]

bool GreenFHom3D::AboveThreshold ( rvec r,
rvec rp )

Heuristic test based on \( k |\mathbf{r} − \mathbf{r}^{\prime}| \).

Parameters
rObservation point.
rpSource point.
Returns
true if the separation is above the threshold; false otherwise.

Above \(\sqrt{0.4}\) we are safely away from the \(1/|r-r'|\) singular behavior, so the plain kernel is accurate enough without special care.

Definition at line 28 of file GreenFHom3D.cpp.

Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ AboveThreshold() [2/2]

bool GreenFHom3D::AboveThreshold ( Triangle * T,
Triangle * Tp )

Heuristic test for two triangles using center distance vs.

perimeters.

Parameters
TObservation triangle.
TpSource triangle.
Returns
true if triangles are sufficiently separated; false if near/coincident.

The distance between triangle centroids is compared to the average size (perimeter/2). If the separation is larger than this size measure, simple quadrature is sufficient.

◆ halfSmoothed()

dcmplx GreenFHom3D::halfSmoothed ( rvec r,
rvec rp )
virtual

Half-smoothed scalar kernel for coincident triangles.

Parameters
rObservation point.
rpSource point.
Returns
Complex scalar half-smoothed kernel.

Keeps only the \(G(r,r') - 1/(4\pi|r-r'|)\) part. Used when triangles coincide (tristatus==3) to improve numerical stability without over-correcting the local behavior.

Definition at line 89 of file GreenFHom3D.cpp.

dcmplx GreenFHom3D::IntegrateD ( RWGFun * f,
RWGFun * fp )
virtual

D-operator matrix element \(\langle \mathbf{f}(\mathbf{r}),\,\overline{\overline G},\,\mathbf{f}(\mathbf{r}^{\prime})\rangle\).

Parameters
fTesting RWG function (on observation triangle).
fpBasis RWG function (on source triangle).
Returns
Complex scalar entry of \(\mathbf D\).
Note
Not used here (exits).

Implements GreenF.

Reimplemented in GreenFHom3DPer2D.

Definition at line 149 of file GreenFHom3D.cpp.

Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ IntegrateDelta()

cvec GreenFHom3D::IntegrateDelta ( rvec r,
RWGFun * fp )
virtual

\(\boldsymbol \delta\) term at an observation point.

Parameters
rObservation point \(\mathbf r\).
fpSource RWG function.
Returns
Complex 3-vector contribution \(\boldsymbol \delta(\mathbf r)\).

Computes \(\int_{T'} [ f_{p}(r') \; G(r,r') - \frac{\nabla' G(r,r')}{k^2}\,\mathrm{div} f_p ] \; dS' \), choosing quadrature and (smoothed vs exact) kernels based on distance heuristics. When near-singular, applies analytical singularity subtraction via SingSub.

Implements GreenF.

Reimplemented in GreenFHom3DPer2D.

Definition at line 157 of file GreenFHom3D.cpp.

Here is the call graph for this function:

dcmplx GreenFHom3D::IntegrateK ( RWGFun * f,
RWGFun * fp )
virtual

K-operator matrix element \(\langle \mathbf{f}(\mathbf{r}),\,\nabla \times \overline{\overline G},\,\mathbf{f}(\mathbf{r}^{\prime})\rangle\).

Parameters
fTesting RWG function (on observation triangle).
fpBasis RWG function (on source triangle).
Returns
Complex scalar entry of \(\mathbf K\).
Note
Not used here (exits).

Implements GreenF.

Reimplemented in GreenFHom3DPer2D.

Definition at line 150 of file GreenFHom3D.cpp.

Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ IntegrateKappa()

cvec GreenFHom3D::IntegrateKappa ( rvec r,
RWGFun * fp )
virtual

\(\boldsymbol \kappa\) term at an observation point.

Parameters
rObservation point \(\mathbf r\).
fpSource RWG function.
Returns
Complex 3-vector contribution \(\boldsymbol \kappa(\mathbf r)\).

Computes \(\int_{T'} f_p(r') \times \nabla' G(r,r')\, dS'\) with the same strategy for quadrature / smoothing as in IntegrateDelta, and uses the corresponding K4 analytic terms for singularity subtraction.

Implements GreenF.

Reimplemented in GreenFHom3DPer2D.

◆ SameTriDK()

void GreenFHom3D::SameTriDK ( const std::vector< RWGFun * > & fvec,
const std::vector< RWGFun * > & fpvec,
std::vector< std::vector< std::pair< dcmplx, dcmplx > > > & DK )
virtual

Compute \(\mathbf D\) and \(\mathbf K\) for all RWG pairs on two triangles.

Parameters
fvecRWGs living on the observation triangle.
fpvecRWGs living on the source triangle.
DKOutput matrix of pairs \((D,K)\) indexed by [i][j].

Adapts quadrature and analytic corrections depending on triangle adjacency: coincident, edge‑adjacent, vertex‑adjacent, or disjoint.

This routine reuses geometry, quadrature points and kernel evaluations to fill many matrix entries at once: fvec lives on triangle T, fpvec on triangle T'. The logic mirrors the single-pair routines but amortizes the cost across pairs.

Implements GreenF.

Reimplemented in GreenFHom3DPer2D.

Definition at line 293 of file GreenFHom3D.cpp.

Here is the call graph for this function:

◆ SameTriDKG()

void GreenFHom3D::SameTriDKG ( const std::vector< RWGFun * > & fvec,
const std::vector< RWGFun * > & fpvec,
std::vector< std::vector< std::pair< dcmplx, dcmplx > > > & DK,
std::vector< std::vector< std::pair< cvec, cvec > > > & DKG )
virtual

Same as SameTriDK plus gradients (if provided by the GF).

Parameters
fvecRWGs on the observation triangle.
fpvecRWGs on the source triangle.
DKOutput matrix of \((D,K)\) pairs.
DKGOutput matrix of gradient pairs per entry.
Note
Intended for different domains (no singularity subtraction here).

DKG[k][l].first accumulates nablaG-weighted D-like terms; DKG[k][l].second holds a 3-vector with row-wise contributions using the second-derivative dyad.

Implements GreenF.

Definition at line 474 of file GreenFHom3D.cpp.

Here is the call graph for this function:

◆ Smoothed()

dcmplx GreenFHom3D::Smoothed ( rvec r,
rvec rp )
virtual

Smoothed scalar kernel used under singularity subtraction.

Parameters
rObservation point.
rpSource point.
Returns
Complex scalar smoothed kernel.

For small \(|r-r'|\), we add/subtract a local expansion to tame the \(1/|r-r'|\) singularity during area integrations. This returns \(G(r,r') - 1/(4\pi|r-r'|) + k^2 |r-r'| / (8\pi)\) which is bounded at coalescence and integrates well over triangles.

Reimplemented in GreenFHom3DPer2D.

Definition at line 73 of file GreenFHom3D.cpp.

Here is the caller graph for this function:
